mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_plans (title, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.select: SELECT tp.plan_id, tp.title, tp.start_date, tp.end_date FROM trip_plans tp JOIN trip_plan_members tpm ON tp.plan_id = tpm.plan_id WHERE tpm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tp.created_at DESC
